_publications._publicationTitle: RENOVO-NF1 accurately predicts NF1 missense variant pathogenicity.

_contextSnippet: With these parameters, accuracy in stable variants in the training set was 98.6%.
details: Achieved 98.6% accuracy in stable variants in the training set with optimized cutoff points at 0.6465 for P/LP and 0.4278 for B/LB
